settings.title: Why are so many patients signing up for MEDVi?
settings.subtitle: On average, patients in the MEDVi program lose 15–20% of their body weight.

settings.title: We'll fix your
settings.paragraph1: Your weight isn't a willpower problem — it's a metabolism problem. Studies show 70% of your weight is genetically determined by hormones like GLP-1.
settings.paragraph2: GLP-1 medication fixes your metabolism at the hormonal level — regulating appetite, slowing digestion, and finally letting your body work with you, not against you.

settings.title: Unlimited 24/7 support
settings.text: MEDVi provides 24/7 access to a dedicated team of licensed specialists, ensuring you have the support you need around the clock — with unlimited appointments, messaging, and expert guidance.

settings.question: How much does the program cost?
settings.answer: The MEDVi Semaglutide program starts at $179 for your first month with no contract. This covers your physician review, personalized plan, 1:1 guidance, metabolic report, and the medication shipped to your door. Refills are $299 and include all the same program benefits.

settings.question: Will this work for me?
settings.answer: Our providers may prescribe compounded GLP-1 medications using the same active ingredients as brand-name options — delivering incredible, clinically-proven results.

settings.question: What if my insurance doesn't cover the medication?
settings.answer: All MEDVi prescriptions are cash-pay. We keep pricing fair so no insurance is necessary — and the program is HSA/FSA eligible.

settings.question: What can I expect after I sign up?
settings.answer: Complete your online visit and our medical providers review your answers. If appropriate, you'll be prescribed medication which ships directly from the pharmacy to your door.
